message:
test(policy): add 28-test governance proof suite for decision invariants

New integration test file proving governance invariants hold:
- Authorization determinism (same input → same decision)
- Precedence (kill-switch > quarantine > revocation > namespace)
- Approval lifecycle integrity (no skipped states, terminal reject)
- Revocation immediate enforcement + scoped isolation
- Forensic completeness (every deny leaves audit/decision trail)
- Quarantine isolation (Isolated blocks all, Restricted blocks writes only)
- Audit chain tamper-evidence (monotonic sequence, hash continuity)
- Composite incident response lifecycle (9-phase E2E)

All 28 proof tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"ft-3681t.6.1.3","title":"[ft-3681t.6.1][support] Composable rule predicate AST for policy DSL","description":"Implement a composable RulePredicate enum with And/Or/Not combinators for policy rule matching. Currently PolicyRuleMatch only supports flat AND/OR within categories. This adds a recursive boolean predicate tree that can express complex policy logic like '(action=spawn AND actor=robot) OR (action=delete AND pane_title="*critical*")'. Types: RulePredicate, PredicateEvaluator, and serde support. Includes comprehensive unit tests and proptest coverage.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-09T22:14:22.668927Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-09T23:05:51.961133Z","closed_at":"2026-03-09T23:05:51.961117Z","close_reason":"Duplicate of closed ft-2h2hp; implementation is already landed in commits 865e91fd/c5d58c72 with follow-up bridge and clippy cleanups in 6086dfbc/cbad021a. PinkForge marked it ready for parent closure.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["dsl","governance","policy"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.1.3","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-09T22:14:22.668927Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2063,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.1.3","author":"PinkForge","text":"Implementation complete in commit c5d58c72. Module: policy_dsl.rs with RulePredicate enum, evaluate_predicate, evaluate_with_trace, DslRule, DslDecision, DslEvalResult, DslTelemetry. Bridge compiler in 6086dfbc. 36 proptest property tests passing. Clippy clean with -D warnings (cbad021a). Ready for parent closure.","created_at":"2026-03-09T22:56:33Z"}]}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.6.2","title":"[policy] Identity graph and least-privilege authorization model","description":"Define identity and authorization mapping across agent identities, panes/sessions, workflows, connectors, and hosts with least-privilege defaults and explicit delegation rules.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Identity graph resolves principal/action/resource consistently. 2. Delegation and scoping rules are explicit. 3. Authorization errors are understandable and actionable.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"DarkChapel","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:14:02.153968Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-08T01:14:34.296441Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["authz","identity","policy"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.5.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:19.400783Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:14:02.153968Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:18.469588Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2005,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.2","author":"DarkChapel","text":"DarkChapel bounded precursor slice (2026-03-08): added non-enforcing identity-graph bridge helpers in crates/frankenterm-core/src/policy.rs so existing policy inputs/decision contexts can derive least-privilege principal/resource/action identities without changing current authorization outcomes.\n\nCode changes:\n- mapped policy ActionKind -> identity_graph::AuthAction via ActionKind::auth_action()\n- mapped ActorKind -> identity_graph::PrincipalKind via ActorKind::principal_kind()\n- added PolicyInput::{identity_principal, identity_resource, identity_action}\n- added DecisionContext::{identity_principal, identity_resource, identity_action}\n- DecisionContext::from_input now records identity_principal / identity_resource / identity_action evidence for standard policy authorize() paths\n- added focused tests covering action mapping stability, workflow/pane scoping, evidence emission, and explicit actor-id override behavior\n\nLocal validation:\n- rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/frankenterm-core/src/policy.rs ✅\n- git diff --check -- crates/frankenterm-core/src/policy.rs ✅\n\nRCH/offloaded cargo attempts:\n- rch workers probe --all -> all 8 workers currently connection_failed (RCH-E100)\n- timeout 30s env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-darkchapel-ft3681t62-check rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib --tests --features mcp,mcp-client,web\n  - remote sync completed, remote execution failed (SSH connect failure to ubuntu@212.90.121.76), rch attempted fail-open local compile; outer timeout exited 124, so no compliant cargo proof recorded\n- timeout 30s env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-darkchapel-ft3681t62-test rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenterm-core decision_context_from_input_records_identity_evidence -- --nocapture\n  - remote sync completed, remote execution failed (SSH connect failure to ubuntu@38.242.134.66), rch attempted fail-open local compile; outer timeout exited 124, so no compliant cargo proof recorded\n\nCoordination/infrastructure notes:\n- MCP Agent Mail registration/inbox fetch worked, but contact requests/file reservations failed repeatedly (database / transport errors), so I could not send the intended intro/reservation messages through mail during this slice.\n- policy.rs had concurrent unrelated edits land during this work; I kept this slice narrow and avoided broad formatter churn.","created_at":"2026-03-08T01:14:34Z"}]}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.6.3","title":"[policy] Approvals, revocation, quarantine, and kill-switch controls","description":"Implement high-confidence governance controls: approval workflows for sensitive actions, revocation flows, quarantine mode for compromised components, and emergency kill-switch semantics.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Emergency kill switch blocks all actions, pane-level quarantine blocks writes or all actions based on severity. 8 integration tests, 328/328 policy tests pass.","created_at":"2026-03-10T06:00:24Z"},{"id":2117,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.3","author":"PinkForge","text":"Implemented ApprovalTracker and RevocationRegistry as PolicyEngine subsystems (48e9f624, d6470114). ApprovalTracker: submit/grant/reject/revoke/expire with bounded queue. RevocationRegistry: revoke/reinstate with active-check in authorize(). Revoked connectors denied as early gate in authorization pipeline. 17 new tests + e2e lifecycle scenario. 434 policy tests passing. PolicyEngine now has 18 integrated subsystems.","created_at":"2026-03-11T00:28:05Z"}]}

Completed in this slice:
1. Added PartialEq derives to 6 policy forensic types (ForensicReport, ForensicAuditEntry, ForensicNamespaceEvent, ForensicComplianceSummary, SendTextAuditSummary, InjectionResult) enabling proper proptest comparison
2. Created 10 new property tests for forensic types: serde roundtrips (with f64 tolerance), denial rate bounds, collection size preservation, hash integrity, kill-switch flag fidelity (057b2a2d)
3. Fixed cannot_approve_non_pending test: entries with expires_at_ms=0 never expire, test now uses non-zero expiry (057b2a2d)
4. All 27 proptest_policy_approval tests + 10 new forensic tests verified passing
5. Clippy clean on -p frankenterm-core --tests

Prior session work included in this bead scope:
- 20 property tests for ApprovalTracker workflow types (ee3c590b)
- 12 property tests for RevocationRegistry types (9769485b)
- Namespace isolation integration proptests (58b7b696)
- 10 clippy warnings fixed (48e9f624)

Total new proptest coverage for policy governance: 42 tests across 2 files.","created_at":"2026-03-11T01:48:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.6.6","title":"[policy] Multi-tenant namespace isolation and cross-tenant guardrails","description":"Formalize tenant/workspace isolation boundaries for agents, sessions, workflows, and connectors so cross-tenant leakage or action bleed-through is prevented by construction.","acceptance_criteria":"1.  {"id":"ft-3681t.7","title":"[epic] Observability, reliability, and scale hardening","description":"# Epic 7: Observability, Reliability, and Scale Validation

Build system-level telemetry, alerting, capacity controls, and resilience testing necessary for large multi-agent fleets with active connector workloads.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Metrics/logs/traces/events are unified across mux/orchestrator/connectors.
2. Capacity controls and alerting prevent cascade failures.
3. Chaos/scale validation demonstrates reliability targets.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:09:46.299237Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-02T19:31:58.344763Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["epic","observability","performance","reliability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.7","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:09:46.299237Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.7","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:09:51.387852Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.7","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:09:51.801410Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.7","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:09:52.188405Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1724,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.7","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Design note: Reliability is first-class.
